# High Density Polyethylene

**Summary**: A high-density form of polyethylene used in various industrial and consumer products.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] identified HDPE as a component of fragments and filaments.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] HDPE is a common industrial plastic that contributes to marine pollution.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] Identified via ATR-FTIR spectroscopy.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- HDPE was found in fragments and filaments with blue, green, and transparent colors. ([[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022, p. 52]])
